name: financial_services_emergency_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: Treasury operations is holding six-figure wires after a sanctions-screening model upgrade produced a spike in false positives. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services emergency marrowbridge lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A vendor bridge ends at forty-five minutes; after that, configuration changes require a full change-advisory board. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Fatima Rahman
agents.identity: I am Fatima Rahman, the accountable executive on this bridge in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Bennett
agents.identity: I am Sana Bennett, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Fatima Rahman must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Fatima Rahman do?
